properties.description: 像一本私藏视觉参考册，而不是素材站合集 冷静、克制、都市、低饱和，但不能无聊 更接近 Hidden NY / JJJJound / archive mood，而不是网红旅行图 图片最好来自别人已经 curated 过的 moodboard、editorial board、视觉档案 每天可以借一个实时主题，但主题服务审美，不要为了热点牺牲品味

properties.description: Build daily taste recognition.
Train the audience to understand the taste behind clothes.
Give the account a less static, more cinematic edge.
Make the account feel intelligent, not just pretty.
Turn taste into commercial direction.

nodes.label: rule: Good things do not need to shout.

nodes.label: rule: A thing can be expensive, but it cannot flex.

nodes.label: rule: A thing can be weird, but it cannot feel cheap.

properties.why: Reliable runway/lookbook image archive with designer context.
Quiet uniform, relaxed tailoring, understated styling.
Deep fashion/culture interviews and theory-adjacent pieces.
Lookbook and streetwear drops; needs strict taste filtering.
Trend and editorial style links; useful but should avoid generic influencer pieces.
Fashion film archive and submissions, better for wild visual references.
Experimental fashion moving image and process references.
Youth culture, art, music, fashion video references.
Useful for cinematic, unusual video language outside fashion.
Culture and fashion essays with stronger point of view.
Fashion culture with attitude; good for article angles.
Architecture/design/culture depth that can feed lifestyle positioning.
Fashion industry context, useful for deeper posts and captions.
